_publications._publicationTitle: Transplantation of miPSC/mESC-derived retinal ganglion cells into healthy and glaucomatous retinas.

_contextSnippet: When using L1cam as an isolation marker for the later-performed RNA-seq transplants, a reduction in bolus tissue formation was observed
details: L1cam selection resulted in reduced bolus tissue formation compared to Thy1-based isolation, supporting its use for isolating slightly more mature RGCs
